user_query:
I'm reaching out to Marin (a book blogger) to get their opinion on our summer titles. Please use only the local files in this workspace to prepare two deliverables.

Inputs:
- input/releases.yaml
- input/draft_email.md
- config/pitch_config.json

Your tasks:
1) Rewrite input/draft_email.md into a finalized outreach email at output/email_final.md, applying the selection rules from config/pitch_config.json to the title list in input/releases.yaml.
   - Use config/pitch_config.json to decide which titles to include. Include a title only if ALL of the following are true:
     • genre is in include_genres
     • pub_date is between date_window.start and date_window.end (inclusive)
     • priority >= min_priority
     • title is NOT in exclude_titles
     • if include_if_no_embargo_only is true, the title’s embargo_date must be null/empty
   - Update the salutation using email_salutation and blogger_name from the config (replace any placeholder in the draft accordingly).
   - Ensure the email references the exact date window from the config (include the literal range "2026-06-01 to 2026-08-31" somewhere in the body so it’s verifiable).
   - Replace the draft’s tentative selection with only the included titles, each as a bullet that contains: Title, Author, pub_date in YYYY-MM-DD, and a one-sentence pitch. If blogger_pitch is missing/empty for a title, use the text "Pitch TBD" for that item.
   - Do not list any titles that are excluded by the rules above. Keep the rest of the email professional and concise.

2) Compose an internal status summary at output/summary_report.md that documents what you did and what the data shows:
   - Summarize the filter criteria actually used by echoing the values from config/pitch_config.json.
   - Provide counts: total titles in releases.yaml, number included, number excluded.
   - Provide counts by exclusion reason (genre not included, outside date window, below priority, excluded by title, embargo present when not allowed). A title may appear under multiple reasons if applicable.
   - List the included titles with Title — Author — pub_date.
   - List any titles with missing blogger_pitch.
   - Note whether all required config keys (include_genres, min_priority, date_window, exclude_titles, include_if_no_embargo_only, blogger_name, email_salutation) are present; if any are missing, name them.

Constraints:
- Do not fetch any external data; rely entirely on the provided files.
- The outputs must be saved to: output/email_final.md and output/summary_report.md.
- Make sure the included titles and counts are internally consistent with the inputs and the config. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
